summary: Iteration 10 - New features tested: 1) Predictions Tab (Polymarket API) with top 10 events and extreme mover card. 2) Portfolio Page redesign with two tabs (My Portfolio CRUD + RUKOS_CRYPTO read-only). All 124 backend tests passed (including 26 new tests for predictions/portfolio). All 38 frontend tests passed (5 predictions + 11 portfolio + 12 core-flows + 14 dashboard-features = 42 in new specs, some existing).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (42/42 tests passed - 5 predictions, 11 portfolio, 12 core-flows, 14 dashboard-features)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test positions: BTC 1.5 @ $62K (HOLD), ETH 20 @ $1800 (HOLD), SOL 100 @ $75 (ALTs)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two new features verified: 1) Predictions Tab at position 6 in dashboard tabs (between Altseason and Risk Engine), fetches real Polymarket data with top_events array and extreme_mover. 2) Portfolio page has two tabs with data-testid='tab-my-portfolio' and data-testid='tab-rukos-portfolio'. My portfolio supports CRUD operations via /api/portfolio/positions. RUKOS_CRYPTO portfolio is empty (not configured by admin). Login helper updated to use input[type] selectors instead of placeholder regex.

features_tested.predictions_api: PASS - GET /api/predictions returns top_events, extreme_mover, total_volume, active_markets, source=Polymarket
features_tested.predictions_tab_ui: PASS - Predictions tab visible in dashboard, shows events with probability bars, links to polymarket.com
features_tested.portfolio_my_api: PASS - GET /api/portfolio/my returns user positions with groups HOLD/ALTs/HI_RISK and real CoinGecko prices
features_tested.portfolio_two_tabs: PASS - PortfolioPage shows 'Мой портфель' and 'Портфель RUKOS_CRYPTO' tabs
features_tested.portfolio_add_dialog: PASS - Add position dialog has asset, size, entry_price, group, notes fields
features_tested.portfolio_pnl_calculation: PASS - PnL calculated correctly from (current_price - entry_price) * size
features_tested.rukos_portfolio_empty: PASS - Shows empty state message when not configured by admin
